normalized_title: WAPC Position Statement: Public Open Space
version_date: 19 December 2025 (operational date 19/12/2025; publication date stated as 08/05/2026)
scope_summary: WAPC position statement (prepared under Part 14 of the Planning and Development Act 2005) governing the planning, provision and contribution of Public Open Space across all urban areas of Western Australia. It applies to local planning strategies, schemes, structure plans and all subdivision (including strata), continuing the Stephenson-Hepburn minimum of 10 per cent of gross subdivisible area for POS, with reduced contribution rates and caps for infill and mixed use sites, regional variations, and detailed rules for cash in lieu collection, expenditure, disposal and management of POS. It replaces DC 2.3 Public Open Space in Residential Areas and the Position Statement on Expenditure of Cash in Lieu of Public Open Space.

key_numeric_standards.applies_to: all residential subdivision (green title, all strata types, community title) across all urban areas

key_numeric_standards.topic: infill POS contribution during deferral period (19 Dec 2025 - 18 Dec 2027)
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: infill subdivision of any number of lots, unless already required under the local planning scheme

key_numeric_standards.topic: infill POS contribution exemption from 19 Dec 2027
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: infill subdivision (including built strata) of 5 lots or less - no POS contribution unless justified by local planning strategy/scheme

key_numeric_standards.topic: infill POS contribution where locality has less than 10% POS
key_numeric_standards.unit: % of gross subdivisible area (capped at $4,000 per lot)
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: infill subdivision of 6 lots or more, from 19 Dec 2027

key_numeric_standards.topic: infill POS contribution where locality has 10% or more POS
key_numeric_standards.unit: % of gross subdivisible area (capped at $1,600 per lot)
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: infill subdivision of 6 lots or more, from 19 Dec 2027

key_numeric_standards.topic: infill POS contribution for strata with communal open space exceeding R-Codes requirements
key_numeric_standards.unit: % of gross subdivisible area (capped at $2,000 per lot)
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: strata infill subdivision of 6 lots or more, from 19 Dec 2027

key_numeric_standards.value: no contribution where development approval issued on or before 19 Dec 2029 and subdivision approved on or before 19 Dec 2033
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: built strata subdivision of 6 lots or more

key_numeric_standards.topic: mixed use site minimum POS contribution (density up to and including R80/R-AC4, or up to 3 storeys)
key_numeric_standards.unit: % of total mixed use site area

key_numeric_standards.topic: mixed use site minimum POS contribution (density exceeding R80/R-AC4)
key_numeric_standards.unit: % of total mixed use site area

key_numeric_standards.topic: staged subdivision POS rate where POS not fully provided in first stage
key_numeric_standards.unit: % of gross subdivisible area per stage
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: staged subdivisions without an agreed POS sharing arrangement

cross_references.cited: Development Control Policy 2.3 Public Open Space in Residential Areas (replaced)
Position Statement Expenditure of cash in lieu of public open space (replaced)
Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015
Residential Design Codes (communal open space requirements)
Stephenson-Hepburn Plan (1955 Plan for the Metropolitan Region Perth and Fremantle)
WAPC Fact Sheet Strata - Form 15 Applications

quality_flags: multi-column layout extracted with column interleaving - Tables 1 and 2 (infill contribution rates) are flattened into interleaved prose and need careful reading
source document date anomaly: publication date (08/05/2026) postdates the operational date (19/12/2025); the document is dated and cited as 19 December 2025

note: the aliases file maps 'Liveable Neighbourhoods' to DC-009, whose manifest instrument_name is 'Development Control Policy 2.2 Residential Subdivision' - mapping followed as instructed but the alias may warrant verification
